message:
Running command: # ODB-0229 is a benign warning (library loaded twice due to EXTRA_LIBS duplication - cosmetic)
# Monitor GlobalPlacement
sleep 120
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_resume2.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/ | sort -V | tail -6
tail -8 /tmp/pnr_resume2.log
